macro.title: Freezing dormant BTC would trigger worst single day repricing in bitcoin’s history, says maximalist - CoinDesk
macro.summary: Some bitcoin advocates argue freezing dormant coins would set a dangerous precedent, while others say failing to act could pose greater risks.

macro.title: Big Tech’s $16 Trillion Earnings Week Is Make-Or-Break for Rally - Bloomberg
macro.summary: Wall Street’s biggest technology stocks have carried the S&P 500 to record highs even as the war in Iran continues. Now, earnings from a handful of them this week will give investors a read on whether this rally’s sustainable.
